framework_name: RBI IT Outsourcing and Cloud Controls
caveat: This framework content pack is a structured starter representation and does not constitute legal advice or complete regulatory coverage. This is a starter content pack for scoping purposes only. It does not constitute legal advice or a complete compliance determination.

sections.title: Outsourcing Scope and Risk
sections.description: Due diligence and risk assessment before outsourcing

sections.title: Monitoring and Exit
sections.description: Ongoing monitoring and exit readiness for outsourced IT services

obligations.title: Risk-based due diligence before outsourcing critical IT services
obligations.description: Perform documented due diligence, contract controls, and risk assessment before onboarding outsourced IT or cloud service providers.
obligations.applicability_notes: Applies before onboarding any outsourced IT, cloud, or critical third-party service provider.

obligations.title: Ongoing monitoring and exit readiness
obligations.description: Maintain continuous monitoring, concentration risk oversight, and tested exit strategy for critical outsourced services.
obligations.applicability_notes: Exit strategy should be tested periodically to confirm continuity of critical functions.

content_versions.obligation_text: Perform documented risk-based due diligence and contractual control review before onboarding outsourced IT/cloud service providers.
Maintain continuous vendor monitoring, concentration-risk oversight, and a tested exit strategy for critical outsourced services.

control_suggestions.control_description: Perform documented due diligence and contractual control review, including data-localization and exit-clause checks, before onboarding outsourced IT or cloud service providers.
